## 2025-04-04 - Fix XSS vulnerability in CodePreview component
**Vulnerability:** The CodePreview component in `src/components/assistant/code-preview.tsx` directly uses `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` with HTML generated by Shiki (`highlighter.codeToHtml()`) without explicitly sanitizing it, potentially allowing an XSS vector if any untrusted string makes its way through correctly.
**Learning:** Even though Shiki aims to escape its output when parsing recognized languages, using `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` directly with unsanitized HTML is unsafe. Malformed or crafted content when not fully parsed might expose vectors, and defense-in-depth requires explicit sanitization.
**Prevention:** Always use a well-tested HTML sanitization library (like `xss` or `DOMPurify`) before using `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`. Specifically, white-list only the tags and attributes that are strictly required by the renderer.
